ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aster DM Healthcare Limited announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has sanctioned its Scheme of Amalgamation with Quality Care India Limited (QCIL). This approval paves the way for QCIL's dissolution and the full integration of its business into Aster DM upon completion of final procedural filings, materially impacting Aster DM's operational scale and financial structure. No red flags are present, as this communication details a positive, expected procedural step in a corporate restructuring.
